overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a forest trail. The clip begins in sunny afternoon light and transitions to a dramatic stormy atmosphere with dense fog and orange skies as a horse rider passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: deciduous forest trail with red dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red dirt forest path surrounded by tall trees

notable_agents.action: riding a horse along the path, overtaking the character from behind and moving ahead into the distance

entered.detail: tall green leafy deciduous trees forming the forest canopy on the left side
tall green leafy deciduous trees forming the forest canopy on the right side
reddish-brown dirt trail winding through the forest with visible tire tracks
grass and small plants growing alongside the path
bushes and ferns growing alongside the path
visible sky through the tree canopy showing partly cloudy conditions

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a red dirt trail through a dense deciduous forest on a partly cloudy afternoon. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled light on the path. A horse rider overtakes the character from the left, riding ahead along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail during approaching storm with heavy fog

events.description: weather changes from partly cloudy to stormy with dense fog rolling in and sky turning orange
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dark, diffused storm light with orange hue

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as visibility decreases due to fog and storm clouds

entered.detail: dense white fog rolling through the forest at ground level reducing visibility
dark orange and grey storm clouds covering the sky with dramatic lighting

segments.scene_description: The forest atmosphere transforms dramatically as a storm approaches. Dense fog rolls through the trees while the sky turns a deep orange color. Visibility drops significantly as the character continues walking along the path, with the trees becoming dark silhouettes against the stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transforms from a bright, sunny afternoon into a dramatic, storm-swept landscape. It begins with the character walking along a red dirt path through a dense deciduous forest, where sunlight filters through the canopy to create dappled light. As a horse rider overtakes the character from the left and disappears ahead, the atmosphere shifts abruptly with the approach of a storm. Dense fog rolls through the trees while the sky turns a deep orange, causing visibility to drop significantly. The scene finally settles into a moody vista where the surrounding trees become dark silhouettes against the vivid, stormy sky.
